name: rolepod-dblab
description: Data-layer safety + truth verifier MCP server + 5 shipped skills (db-introspect, db-query, db-explain, db-migrate-verify, db-write) for AI coding agents. Works standalone with a connection string; pair with the `rolepod` parent plugin (detected via the marker file `<git-root>/.rolepod/parent-active`) and dblab becomes the DB evidence/gate provider — evidence routes to `<git-root>/.rolepod/evidence/` with `manifest.json` per Extension Protocol v1. Not a generic SQL client: safe mutation, schema-drift, DB state as PASS/FAIL evidence.
